description: Documented gaps in released FBI files. Relational data only. Analysis in analysis/redactions.md

signatories: J. Edgar Hoover — CONFIRMED PERSONAL SIGNATURE
records.signatory_note: Directors do not sign field memos. Personal signature indicates personal interest or upward reporting obligation.
records.context_before: Tesla completed many experiments with radio transmissions, one of which involved building and perfecting a revolutionary type of torpedo, a device not in use by any—
records.context_after: The memo goes on to warn that this information may fall into enemy hands.

records.signatory_note: Signature itself is redacted. Unusually aggressive redaction for an incident memo.
records.context_before: References theft of Tesla papers by Sava Kosanović.
records.context_after: Papers recovered and later turned over to the Alien Property Custodian.
records.gap_type: ENTIRE PROCESS HIDDEN — only incident and resolution stated, nothing between

records.physical_possibility_note: At 8hr/day for 2 days = 16hrs total for 80 trunks = 12 min/trunk. A trunk holds hundreds of documents. This is not analysis.
records.context_before: Dr. Trump examined the material on January 8 and 9, 1943.
records.context_after: No new sound, workable principles or methods for realizing such results.
records.gap_type: PROCEDURAL IMPOSSIBILITY — the evaluation itself is the redaction
records.missing_document: Authorization memo and briefing instructions given to Trump before evaluation — NOT in released files

records.gap_type: PHYSICAL INVENTORY DISCREPANCY — 20 trunks with no reconciliation document
